comment.body: It’s complicated. Taiwan’s opposition Kuomintang is blocking defense budget and basically has become a CCP mouthpiece… Also, ironically, Taiwan’s deliberate strategy is that TSMC would force the US to guarantee its security (that’s why TSMC is essentially subsidized), ironically now everyone thinks it’s only about chips, and forgot about First Island Chain.
